abilities.name: tera-shell
abilities.shortEffect: All damage-dealing moves that hit the Pokémon when its HP is full will not be very effective.
abilities.effect: The Pokémon’s shell contains the powers of each type. All damage-dealing moves that hit the Pokémon when its HP is full will not be very effective.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's shell contains the powers of each type. All damage-dealing moves that hit the Pokémon when its HP is full will not be very effective.
